creator: root@oak.oakwood.k12.oh.us
text:
I keep getting "ddp_route: still have no valid route" echoed to the
console and to the kernel logs during the day -- sometimes over 100 a day.
I cannot find any information about what this means, and have found at
least one other person who claims the same happens for him.

This didn't seem to happen until I upgraded to 2.2.6-STABLE.

Fix: 

Simple ignore the messages, and make good use of the Ctrl-L key. =)
How-To-Repeat: 
The messages are repeated to the console randomly. Cannot reproduce it on
demand.
